item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crispy pork roast with crackling, served with herb roasted new potatoes, warmbraised red cabbage and rich brown gravy, topped with fresh parsley. Pickledvegetables on the side (6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Curry-roasted salmon tossed with aubergine and potatoes, served on amiso-tomato coulis and topped with fried nori. Bitter leaf salad withpassionfruit vinaigrette on the side (1+3+7+15) GREEN DISH: Curry-roasted soy protein tossed with aubergine and potatoes, served on amiso-tomato coulis and topped with fried nori. Bitter leaf salad withpassionfruit vinaigrette on the side (1+7+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Japanese miso-fried chicken with deep umami and warm spices, served with spicynoodles and kimchi (1+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Japanese fried lion's mane mushroom with deep umami, served with spicy noodlesand kimchi

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Japanese miso-fried chicken with deep umami and warm spices, served with spicynoodles and kimchi (1+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Japanese fried lion's mane mushroom with deep umami, served with spicy noodlesand kimchi

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chili hotdog with a juicy beef sausage and heartychili con carne, topped with melted cheese, fresh sprouts and cress. CreamyAmerican potato salad and dill pickles on the side (1+2+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish GREEN DISH: hotdog with a vegetarian sausage and heartychili sin carne, topped with melted cheese, fresh sprouts and cress. CreamyAmerican potato salad and dill pickles on the side (1+2+6+7+11+15)
